examples.title: Open and close a sidebar
examples.description: Purpose: On mobile, sidebars are often hidden until the user taps a menu button—JavaScript toggles a CSS class to show or hide it. Output: Click Menu to slide the sidebar open; click again to close it. Try: Change the button label or sidebar link text.
